column3: For the pot of this [best soup type] soup‚ we must add some ingredients.
Well for the first ingredient‚ we'll throw in some carrots!
For a truly [positive descriptor] soup‚ you must MUST put in chocolate.
Who would want carrots in their [best soup type] soup?
I should keep the stomachs of our crew in mind.
However‚ I need to keep the head chef happy too.
